title: Blue Mountains
subTitle: Som's mother sees her son's selection for a singing reality show as a second chance to fulfil her own dreams. However, complications arise when he faces a quick defeat.

title: Jaalsaaz
subTitle: After the murder of millionaire Ranjit Rai, his mistress Radha is apprehended by the police. Journalist Rakesh teams up with his friends and a skilled defence lawyer to uncover the truth.

title: Charanon Ki Saugandh
subTitle: After returning to his village, Ravi learns that the local farmers are being oppressed by a despotic landlord. Soon, he decides to contest the panchayat elections against the tyrant and put an end to his cruel rule.

title: Speed
subTitle: A woman is held captive by a group of kidnappers to compel her MI5 husband to exterminate the prime minister of the country.

title: Aulad
subTitle: Believing his wife to be dead, Anand gives up his own child to Yashoda, who has lost her husband and her baby. However, he faces a dilemma when his wife returns.

title: Dosti: Friends Forever
subTitle: Karan, a wealthy heir, lives a lonely life and is neglected by his family. When he has a fatal accident, Raj, a poor orphan, saves his life and they become inseparable friends.

title: Karle Pyaar Karle
subTitle: When childhood friends Kabir and Preet play a game that results in a crime, he and his mother leave town. They reunite after 12 years but Preet believes they must maintain distance.

title: Khwahish
subTitle: Two individuals fall in love and marry against their parents' wishes. However, their life takes a dramatic turn when the woman is diagnosed with a life-threatening disease.

title: Paayal
subTitle: A widowed woman's daughter elopes with her lover. Years later, when her granddaughter also falls in love, she strives to accept the relationship.

title: Fun2shh... Dudes in the 10th Century
subTitle: Three men are accused of stealing a crown and whilst on the run, they are transported to the 10th century. Amidst several adventures, they must try to bring the crown back to prove their innocence.

title: Auzaar
subTitle: Suraj, a police officer, is assigned to arrest his friend Yash, whose father runs an illegal business. He must now persuade his friend to make his father change his ways to avoid the consequences.

title: Auzaar
subTitle: Suraj, a police officer, is assigned to arrest his friend Yash, whose father runs an illegal business. He must now persuade his friend to make his father change his ways to avoid the consequences.

title: Ranbanka
subTitle: Rahul, an ordinary engineer, comes to Mathura with his wife and son. However, when a gangster gets attracted to his wife and forces her to marry him, he tries to find a way to stop his advances.

title: Mera Faisla
subTitle: Raj wishes to marry Rati but faces humiliation from her father due to the stigma associated with his lineage. Soon, he decides to join the police force to restore his family's honour.

title: Bombai Ka Babu
subTitle: Babu, who kills a man, is blackmailed by Bhagat into assuming the identity of a wealthy heir, Kundan, for his money. However, things get complicated when Babu falls in love with Kundan's sister.

title: Pyar Hi Pyar
subTitle: At an orphanage, Kailashnath identifies Vijay as his biological son and takes him home. Years later, a man named Ashok arrives and claims to be Kailashnath's real son.

title: Raja Hindustani
subTitle: Raja, a taxi driver, falls in love with Aarti, a rich girl and marries her against her parents' wishes. Later, her stepmother tries to create differences between the couple.

title: S.P. Chauhan
subTitle: Satpal Chauhan, a social worker from Haryana, works for women empowerment and also strives to create an alcohol-free society. However, while pursuing his goals, he faces several hardships.

title: Phamous
subTitle: Radhe looks up to Kadak Singh, a local politician, but holds a grudge against his partner, Ram Tripathi. However, things reach a boiling point when Tripathi sets his sights on Radhe's wife, Lalli.

title: Dharam Veer
subTitle: Twin brothers separated at birth become best friends, unaware of their bond as siblings. The queen, their mother, becomes the uniting force as they set out to defeat their evil uncle.

title: Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke
subTitle: Rahul looks after his spoilt nephews, Sunny and Vicky, and niece, Munni. When they go to a funfair, they meet Vyjayanti, who has run away from home, and decide to shelter her without Rahul's consent.

title: Dil
subTitle: A father pretends to be a rich industrialist to improve his son's chances of marrying in to wealth. However, his plan backfires on him when his true identity is found out.

title: Dil
subTitle: A father pretends to be a rich industrialist to improve his son's chances of marrying in to wealth. However, his plan backfires on him when his true identity is found out.

title: Mann
subTitle: Dev and Priya fall in love despite being engaged to their respective partners and decide to reunite after six months to get married. However, destiny has other plans for them.

title: Love Love Love
subTitle: Amit, the son of a taxi driver, and Reema, a rich business man's daughter, fall in love. However Reema's father wants to marry her to Vicky, who's father is the biggest gangster in Mumbai. How will their love triumph?

title: Yeh Lamhe Judaai Ke
subTitle: Dushant, an aspiring singer, is encouraged by Jaya to achieve his dreams. However, after Dushant becomes successful, his other friends try to create misunderstandings between him and Jaya.

title: Pakeezah
subTitle: Sahibjaan, a young courtesan, falls in love with Salim. The two wish to marry, but the nature of her profession keeps casting a dark shadow over their plans.

title: Jeans
subTitle: Madhumita and Vishwanathan fall in love with each other but his father disapproves of the relationship as he wants his twin sons to marry two identical twins.

title: Encounter: The Killing
subTitle: Sam Bharucha, a police inspector, often comes across youth gangs creating nuisance in the city. When a young mobster is killed by him during a shootout, he embarks on a mission to find his family.

title: Daata
subTitle: A decorated school teacher's life is upended by devastating rumours, which ultimately leads to his death. His son Kundan now seeks vengeance.

title: Naina
subTitle: After years of blindness caused by an accident, Naina gets a successful cornea transplant. However, she soon begins to see terrifying visions that prompt her to investigate the source of her sight.

title: Maachis
subTitle: Jaswant is arrested and tortured for a crime he did not commit. On seeing his friend's condition, Kripal joins an extremist group in order to bring down the government.

title: Love Love Love
subTitle: Amit, the son of a taxi driver, and Reema, a rich business man's daughter, fall in love. However Reema's father wants to marry her to Vicky, who's father is the biggest gangster in Mumbai. How will their love triumph?
